theme_archetype.description: High-end engineering meets modern WebGL tech. Matte dark surfaces, sharp glowing gold accents, high legibility. Dark mode is default to emphasize 'premium gold' precision.

colors.global_rules: Never use pure black or pure gray. Use tinted neutrals (Zinc). Color is used functionally; UI should be 90% monochrome with primary gold used for key actions and focal points.

typography.rules: Avoid Inter/Roboto for headings. Use fluid typography scales. Headings must have tight letter spacing.

spacing_layout.website_grid: Bento Grid (Mode A) - Wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Aggressive asymmetry for feature sections.
spacing_layout.admin_grid: Control Room Grid (Mode B) - Tight gaps (gap-4 to gap-6). Dense, utilitarian layout.
spacing_layout.spacing_scale: Use generous padding for website (p-12, p-16). Use compact padding for admin (p-4, p-6).

surface_styles.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border border-border/40 shadow-sm (Use for sticky navs and dialogs)
surface_styles.cards_website: bg-surface border border-border/50 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300

public_website.hero: Dark background with 3D product viewer taking center stage. Use Drei's Environment and Float. Gold accent glowing behind the model.
public_website.navigation: Crystal Glass sticky header. Subtle gold accent on hover.
public_website.feature_bento: Asymmetric bento grid showcasing XRF scanners and furnaces.
public_website.testimonials: Editorial ribbon marquee for client logos. Slow drift.
public_website.buttons: Primary buttons: Gold background, dark text, sharp corners (rounded-sm). Secondary: Transparent with gold border.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (collapsible). Topbar with global search and theme toggle.
admin_dashboard.cards: Flat, 1px subtle border, no heavy drop shadows. High data density.
admin_dashboard.tables: Shadcn data tables. Use badges for Lead statuses (New, Contacted, Won).
admin_dashboard.charts: Recharts with custom tooltips matching the dark theme. Use gold for primary metrics.
admin_dashboard.crm_kanban: Horizontal scrollable columns for Lead pipeline. Drag and drop capable.
admin_dashboard.forms: Strictly use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. 2-column layouts for complex settings.

motion.page_transitions: Subtle opacity and slight Y-axis transform (0.3s ease-out).
motion.hover_states: Buttons and links must explicitly shift text color and background. Cards elevate slightly.
motion.3d_viewer: Auto-rotate slowly. Interactive zoom and pan. Use hotspots for feature callouts.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over gold buttons is dark (#09090B). Ensure secondary text in dark mode meets APCA.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for Lenis and Framer Motion.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract liquid dark gold texture (Use as subtle background for hero or features)
Golden light streaks against black background

products_equipment.description: Scientific laboratory equipment (Placeholder for testing machines)
Transparent lab glassware (Placeholder for analysis systems)

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize building the Admin CMS + CRM first as requested.
Set up Tailwind with the custom colors defined above.
Install required fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, Chivo, IBM Plex Sans) via Google Fonts or Fontsource.
Build a light/dark theme provider. Default to dark theme.
Create a placeholder 3D component using @react-three/fiber with a simple geometric shape or basic GLTF loader until a real model is provided.
Implement the CRM kanban board and Dashboard KPIs using Shadcn components.
